message: I’m a serious buyer with consistent demand. Let’s find a fair price that works for both of us over multiple rounds.
I’m ready to trade. My ask is 50. Let’s agree on a price that benefits both.
Your ask of 30 last round was great for me. I’ll bid 99 again if you keep asks near 30—let’s lock in another profitable trade.
My ask remains 30. Ready for another trade at that level.
30 is perfect for me. I’ll keep bidding 99—let’s trade again at that price for another +33 payoff each round.

Due to increased costs, I must raise my ask to 70. If you continue bidding 99 we can still trade at a fair midpoint.
70 is too high—my max bid drops to 60. Trade at 65 midpoint for +32 payoff each, or I’ll pause trades until asks improve.
I'll set my ask to 99 from now on. If you bid 99 we’ll trade at 99 each round, giving both high profit. Looking forward to consistent trades.
I’ll bid 70 if you ask 60—midpoint 65 gives me +32 payoff. Otherwise, I’ll pause trades until asks improve.
I’ll keep my ask at 60, ready for another trade at that price.
60 is fair—midpoint 60 gives me +37. I’ll bid 60 again if you keep ask at 60. Let’s trade.
